stdout: {"status":"completed","message":"Revised the core in place: totalized def:approximation-ratio with an explicit zero-loss convention and propagated that convention into thm:surrogate-certificate and oeq:dispersion-certificate; surfaced the explicit observable lower bound from thm:heterogeneity-separation at the theorem node; rewrote thm:hetero-envelope so its proof explicitly uses the stated causal and sparse-graph assumptions; and aligned the top-level scope prose with the now-proved surrogate-certificate/negative-dispersion split.","artifacts":["/<repo-root>/CausalSmith/doc/formalization/research/exp_bipartite_minimax_design/discovery/core.json"]}

{"status":"completed","message":"Revised core.json in place to resolve all D0.5 findings: aligned the ambient probability-vector domain and feasible-design definition to the open cube required by the inverse-probability objects, patched the homogeneous-reduction and hetero-envelope proofs to state that domain explicitly, relabeled def:kkt-gradient/g_k as the quarter-envelope gradient and updated dependent KKT proof text, and rewrote the note-level scope prose so the bounded-degree surrogate certificate is claimed as a theorem-level contribution rather than framed as open.","artifacts":["/<repo-root>/CausalSmith/doc/formalization/research/exp_bipartite_minimax_design/discovery/core.json"]}

{"status":"failed","message":"thm:postdesign-wald (wrong_measure): the defect is statement-level, not proof-DAG/prose-level. The current node asserts the Wald coverage liminf under a free measure P_p, while the proof and all referenced objects are instantiated at the selected design p_n^*(G_n) and therefore support only the law P_{p_n^*(G_n)}. Any honest fix requires changing the theorem's displayed statement/conclusion to bind the measure to the selected design; that kind of statement edit is outside Stage 0.R's in-place scope and must be made by the orchestrator in the proto, otherwise the edit will be discarded on re-solve."}

{"status":"completed","message":"Updated the core in place to discharge the D0.5 positioning findings: added Brennan-Mirrokni-Pouget-Abadie (2022) and Shi et al. (2024) to the bibliography and related-work/prose fields, corrected thm:convex-design's gap text so Doudchenko et al. (2020) is treated as generalized-propensity bipartite inference rather than a design-optimization paper, and aligned the global project-justification language with the revised comparator set.","artifacts":["/<repo-root>/CausalSmith/doc/formalization/research/exp_bipartite_minimax_design/discovery/core.json"]}

{"status":"completed","message":"Revised the core in place to resolve both D0.5 positioning findings: the surrogate-certification frontier is now consistently framed as solved in split form throughout the note, with oeq:dispersion-certificate positioned as the negative dispersion-only counterexample, thm:surrogate-certificate positioned as the positive bounded-degree certificate, and the headline scope/prose updated accordingly. Patched the affected node proof_tex fields to make that split explicit and verified the edited core JSON parses successfully.","artifacts":["/<repo-root>/CausalSmith/doc/formalization/research/exp_bipartite_minimax_design/discovery/core.json"]}

{"status":"failed","message":"Cannot resolve D0.5 finding decision/thm:heterogeneity-separation/bound_buried or decision/thm:surrogate-certificate/constant_buried within Stage 0.R bounds.
